pageContext.name: EZ-015 Iron Kong (Marking Plus Version)
pageContext.description: 'The strongest all-purpose Zoid in the Empires!'  Iron Kong, the first large-scale item created within the HMM series, rejoins the lineup. This model kit includes the added items in the Iron Kong PK model kit: ABS elbow parts, newly-designed decals, and clear parts.  In addition to the original clear green canopy and other parts, the kit also includes additional colorless clear parts that can be customized with model paint.  Be sure to add this Zoid from the Empire's army capable of standing against Gojulas to your collection today!
